svg.aria-label: Sheet Music for "The Old Morpeth Rant"
svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "The Old Morpeth Rant"

text.tspan: G C/G G/Am D7 | G D7 C/Am D7
G C/G D7 D7/G | C D7 G/D7 D7/G
Notes: Apparently has little to do with the (New) Morpeth Rant, besides a shared name.
